headline: 5 Insightful Analyst Questions From Paramount’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Paramount’s first quarter results reflected steady execution on its dual priorities of content expansion and digital transformation. Management credited the quarter’s performance to the continued ramp-up of its expanded film slate, robust streaming engagement, and higher monetization via new ad tech features. CEO David Ellison pointed to the success of Scream 7 and Landman as proof points, while CFO Dennis Cinelli emphasized improved subscriber quality and a shift toward more profitable direct-t
